items.title:
[正面] 번역 빼면 엄청난 완성도의 슬더슬 스타일 기반 가챠게임
스토리 완성도도 높고, 무과금도 ...
items.summary:
번역 빼면 엄청난 완성도의 슬더슬 스타일 기반 가챠게임
스토리 완성도도 높고, 무과금도 가능하긴 한데 혜자로 보이는 패키지가 너무 많아서 저절로 지갑이 열리는 게임
저는 2주년 끝자락 유입이라 이벤트 따라가기 위해 과금해서 트럭전사가 되었고.. 더 쉽고 더 재밌어짐
덱빌딩 게임이지만 다키스트던전같이 스톨링해서 엘리트전투나 보스전투를 대비하는 것이 참 매력적임
취향만 맞다면 ㅋㅈㄴ 그 게임 하는 것 보단 훨씬 만족도 높을듯
한국 출시 가능성도 엄청 올라갔고, 번역도 계속 개선되고 있어서 적극 추천하는 게임

items.title: [正面] This is the second best card battler ive ever play...
items.summary:
This is the second best card battler ive ever played and ive played alot from 
-Slay the Spire
-Darkest Dungeon
-Across The Obelisk
-Chrono Arc
-Inscryption
-Monster Train
-Hell Card

My favorite is Chrono Arc (but im a little biased because I played that one first). The reason its good is replayability. Sure those other game's may have had better mechanics in some areas but this game has tons of content (they're still adding more!) and the progression is great. Almost every month there is a new awakener(character) and at this time every 3 months there is a new chapter. Endgame is building 5 different teams and battling different dungeons on as hard as you can for more gear for your characters. These dungeons change continuously. The shop might seem convoluted at first but trust me its worth learning the systems. Deep systems = more depth, which = more things to do. The only downside I found is someone who plays alot of card battlers may find normal mode extremely easy until about the 6th chapter. If youre tired of beating a card battler and feel bummed there's not much else to do other than restart the game, this game is for you. It's one of those games you can keep coming back to. And to the reviewer complaining about it being too hard they should join discord the and reddit, the community is extremely helpful. btw healers suck in this game, this game wants you to play aggressive and use debuffs and buffs to win. There are so many viable teams you can create with the characters. I didnt mention the gameplay mechanics because this review would spill on forever, i'll let you enjoy the discovering them. (Tip : If u click the tentacles u can switch from normal, defensive, attack mode)
